source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Services Net Sales (p.22)
original_text: Services net sales increased 9% or $7.1 billion during 2023 compared to 2022 due to higher net sales across all lines of business.
modified_text: Apple's Services net sales increased 19% or $7.1 billion in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022, on higher sales across all lines of business.
claim: Apple's Services net sales increased 19% or $7.1 billion in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
notes: Sharper quant pattern: changed ONLY the percentage (9% -> 19%) while leaving the adjacent paired figure ($7.1 billion) intact, creating an internal inconsistency (19% and $7.1B don't reconcile). A correct adjacent figure must NOT redeem a fabricated headline number -> unsupported.
